understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to reach the '+' goal gem tile in each level by navigating the tile grid while avoiding hazards, using horizontal movement to trigger gravity-based falling, and clicking to clear breakable blocks.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is horizontal only (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT), after which gravity pulls the player downward until landing on a solid tile, hitting a spike, or reaching the goal. CLICK removes breakable blocks ('x') at targeted coordinates to open fall paths. Spikes ('u'/'v') cause immediate failure. Each attempt has 50 turns, and each level allows 2 attempts. I monitored the corridor scan and landing previews to find passages to lower y-levels, used clicks to clear breakable blocks blocking the gravity path, and avoided spikes.
